h1.visual_description: Large, black, serif font, left-aligned at the top of the page; used for primary document titles.

h2.visual_description: Blue, serif font, underlined; prefixed with 'Part [Roman Numeral]. Chapter [Word] - '; represents major structural divisions.
h2.example_text: Part I. Chapter One - Exploring Your Data

h3.visual_description: Blue, serif font, not underlined; prefixed with 'Section [Number].[Number]: '; represents sub-section level content.
h3.example_text: Section 1.1: Data and Types of Statistical Variables

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Page number reference (Roman numerals for front matter, Arabic for body)
Interactive navigational link or TOC entry

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Right-aligned page numbers; standard top/bottom margins with no visible running headers/footers on this page.
